place separated by just less than two minutes again bernal started the final day in the pink jersey his task was to hold on a flat time trial with plenty of corners left and right in the first two thirds two time checks along the way had a finish in milan's famous piazza duomo right in front of the cathedral philippe organa was the manda watch the stage win on paper should have been his world time trial champion having won the four previous geno d'italia time trials that we'd had and today wouldn't disappoint either that despite a late problem gana going out and with one and a half k's left having a puncture but a quick bike change would save the day the world champion ready to make it five out of five only the second one at this race after there had been three time trials the year before again ghana to this moment unbeaten in a grand tour time troll eduardo afini came in in second place 12 seconds down he'd been one of the names alongside remy cavania who on paper should have threatened ghana cavani was looking good in fact the french champion until this happened an absolute disaster it would have been extremely tight on the line 500 meters to go again quick on his bike that's what he thought about it kavanagh coming across in second place 12 seconds down who knows how it would have gone gnat still the leader for the moment but he had to wait a long while while the gc contenders did their thing bernal caruso and yates separated by just under three and a half minutes at the start of the day but there were changes elsewhere in the top ten martinez moving up almeida putting in a wonderful ride as well yates stayed where he was he'd lose time to second place instead of gaining it caruso would finish strong and gain time on the overall winner but nobody would stop again bernal from coming home to win the giro d'italia arms aloft in milan and in the nation where he came to make his pro debut bernal from colombia in his adopted home of italy winning the giro at the first attempt that sent the colombian fans crazy gan of the stage winner ineos grenadiers taking four stage wins of the 21 and just like they did the year before the malaya ghana winning by 12 seconds from cavania afini finishing in third at 13 with sobrero and almeida in the top five the final podium looked like that carousel on it yates there too and bernard lifting the trophee senzafini one minute 29 his final margin of victory over caruso who finishes on a grand tour podium for the first time yates in the meantime back on a grand tour podium for the first time since he won the welter that's how the top 10 looked peter sagan would take the maya chiclamino for the first time in his career just his second appearance at the g lot he celebrated in style bouchard becoming the first frenchman to win the king of the mountains at the judo since 1984 on la juan fino and the white jersey the best young rider of course going to the gyro winner again bernal milan again became serene at the end of a judo that entertained and enthralled that's the first grand tour of the year done or to come at the tour in the welter for now though ineos grenadiers have their prize again bernal wins the cheeto d'italia
